steps.title: Identify the defining signal
steps.content: The clarification “to see if differences in these traits are associated with considerable variations in venom potency” reveals what kind of effect the researchers are investigating. The word considerable is the key clue.

steps.title: Match the effect's magnitude
steps.content:
Substantial means significant or considerable—the exact scale that would produce “considerable variations in venom potency.” The other choices describe the wrong property (emotional tone, adequacy) or contradict the magnitude needed (imperceptible).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
